base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fds_loading_animation — a effect_layer from 1986 metroid. Disk-loading animation — 4-frame progress. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Disk-loading animation — 4-frame progress; FDS-specific during room-transitions as disk reads
